productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Allegian Black Laptop Bag
description: Stylish to look and comfortable to carry, this absolutely user friendly laptop bag from nike is all that you need to keeep your all-important machine safe. Height: 12.5" Width: 15.5" Depth: 6" Capacity: 15 litresMade of polyurethane, with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bagOne main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a velcroed separator to hold the laptop and accessories, along with a small zippered pouchOne front zippered compartment Wide, adjustable handle, with a padded shoulder strap for carrying easenike swoosh printed on the front, with the Nike Devil embossed on the front zippered compartmentCare Hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine washDo not bleach Do not tumble dryDo not wringLine dry Do not iron
